reviews.review_description:
Dev are you still updating this game? Only needs a few bits changed and I think this will be really good.

Mainly just some visual updates and I play sitting so could do with a way to turn with the controller. 

Do you have a way I can connect with you please.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for the feedback! Glad you think the game has potential 😄

Could you let us know what you think needs changing? We'd really love to hear your specific thoughts — we'll gather them up and make the fixes.

And to answer your question — we're currently working on our next game, which focuses on an Endless Mode where you can fuse plants to fight zombies. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Just the fact that it's PVZ makes it fun but this game could use graphical improvements. two problems I've noticed so far is that you are unable to resume after pausing unless I'm missing something it only gives you the option to leave or restart and the button to pause and resume doesn't work when I try to resume, the second issue is that watching the first lane(closest to the house) requires me to stand right next to the window and physically lean in myself to be able to properly see it fully. Otherwise this is literally just PVZ, I hope to see more improvements to this game.

TLDR: PVZ is fun and this game could do better with it's appearance.
Not bad little game, has  some little bugs but not bad ones. Worth the price. It is plants vs zombies.
